title: Set 02 - MQTT Broker, Publish-Subscribe, Delivery & TLS
subject: IoT

questions.question: Which MQTT component receives published messages and sends them to subscribers?
questions.description: The MQTT broker routes messages between publishers and subscribers.

questions.question: Which MQTT model is used for message delivery?
questions.description: MQTT uses topics where clients publish messages and subscribe to receive messages.

questions.question: Which transport protection is commonly paired with MQTT?
questions.description: MQTT over TLS protects telemetry and credentials in transit.
